message:
fix: remove auto-seed of rig settings from gt rig add

The auto-seed copied .gastown/settings.json into local rig config at
rig creation time, making the runtime merge (repo -> local -> flags)
effectively dead code. Future repo-side updates were silently shadowed
by the forked local copy.

Now repo settings are only resolved at runtime via loadRigCommandVars,
so project updates to .gastown/settings.json take effect immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
